const fs = require('fs');
const vm = require('vm');
const path = require('path');

// Load and evaluate the translated parser code in a VM context

const context = { require, console, RegExp, Set, Array, Object };
vm.createContext(context);
vm.runInContext(code, context);

const ParserBase = context.ParserBase;

function testStandardSection() {
    const raw = '<![temp]]>xyz';
    const parser = ParserBase();
    parser.rawdata = raw;
    const res = parser.parse_marked_section(0, false);
    assert.strictEqual(res, raw.indexOf(']]>') + 3);
}

function testUnknownSection() {
    const raw = '<![unknown]]>';
    const parser = ParserBase();
    parser.rawdata = raw;
    let threw = false;
    try {
        parser.parse_marked_section(0, false);

        threw = true;

    const parser = ParserBase();
    parser.rawdata = raw;
    const res = parser.parse_marked_section(0, false);

import os
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.abspath(os.path.dirname(__file__)))
import unittest
from source import ParserBase

class TestParseMarkedSection(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_standard_section(self):
        raw = '<![temp]]>xyz'
        parser = ParserBase()
        parser.rawdata = raw
        res = parser.parse_marked_section(0, False)
        self.assertEqual(res, raw.index(']]>') + 3)

    def test_unknown_section(self):
        raw = '<![unknown]]>'
        parser = ParserBase()
        parser.rawdata = raw
        with self.assertRaises(AssertionError):
            parser.parse_marked_section(0, False)

    def test_no_closing(self):
        raw = '<![temp'
        parser = ParserBase()
        parser.rawdata = raw
        res = parser.parse_marked_section(0, False)
        self.assertEqual(res, -1)

    def test_report(self):
        raw = '<![temp]]>'
        parser = ParserBase()
        parser.rawdata = raw
        calls = []
        def unknown(data):
            calls.append(data)
        parser.unknown_decl = unknown
        res = parser.parse_marked_section(0, True)
        self.assertEqual(res, raw.index(']]>') + 3)
        self.assertEqual(calls, [raw[3:raw.index(']]>')]])

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()
